title: Toolbar button background styling + version bump to 0.4.147

acceptanceCriteria: The exported version string in appVersion.ts reads '0.4.147'

file_operations.description: Change the exported version string from '0.4.143' to '0.4.147'. This is a single-line change to the string literal.

requirements.summary: Apply background color styling to three specific toolbar buttons in FileList.tsx
acceptanceCriteria: button[2] in the toolbar has backgroundColor '#eff6ff' and no border color styling
button[3] in the toolbar has backgroundColor '#fefce8' and no border color styling
button[4] in the toolbar has backgroundColor '#fefce8' and no border color styling
All other buttons and components remain byte-for-byte identical to v0.4.143
No tooltip logic, breadcrumb, or other component is modified

file_operations.description: In the toolbar div, locate the button group containing the three target buttons at XPath positions button[2], button[3], and button[4]. For button[2] (File upload), remove any border color styling and add backgroundColor: '#eff6ff' to its style prop. For button[3] and button[4] (Folder-related buttons), remove any border color styling and add backgroundColor: '#fefce8' to their style props. Make no other changes to FileList.tsx—do not modify tooltip logic, breadcrumb rendering, event handlers, or any other buttons.
